name: Dana Valery
abstract: Dana Valery Catalano (born Fausta Dana Galli; July 15, 1944) is an Italian-born South African-reared singer, actress, and television performer who started her career in the entertainment industry at the age of 16 in Johannesburg, South Africa, where her family immigrated from Italy in 1947. The singer has performed on television, radio, …

about_quotes.speaker: Dan D'Imperio
about_quotes.evidence: I went on the road with her for a year, 1969, I traveled with her.
